LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS PHIL TING, IN HIS CAPACITY AS THE ASSESSOR-RECORDER AND THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEBRUARY 4, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PHIL TING IN HIS CAPACITY AS THE ASSESSOR-RECORDER AND THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN LIGHT OF THE J.H MCNIGHT RANCH CASE. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAS PLED THE COMPLAINT IN SUCH A WAY AS IT COMES WITHIN THE RULES ESTABLISHED BY THE MCKNIGHT CASE INCLUDING ACTUAL NOTICE AND POSSIBLE ESTOPPEL. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TING, PHIL IN HIS CAPACITY AS THE ASSESSOR-RECORDE, THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - PARTIES HAVE REACHED STIPULATION RE: FILING OF 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. WITHOUT RULING ON THE PORTION OF THE DEMURRER RELATING TO THE ONE-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, THE PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED UNTIL OCTOBER 31, 2012 TO FILE A 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. MINI MINUTES: Appearances: THOMAS TUNNY, ESQ., REUBEN & JUNIUS, 415.567.9000, FOR PLAINTIFF 2342 BROADWAY, LLC.
THOMAS LAKRITZ, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANTS PHIL TING IN HIS CAPACITY AS THE ASSESSOR-RECORDER AND THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: Argued and the Court VACATED its tentative ruling. PARTIES HAVE REACHED STIPULATION RE: FILING OF 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. WITHOUT RULING ON THE PORTION OF THE DEMURRER RELATING TO THE ONE-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, THE PLAINTIFF IS GRANTING UNTIL OCTOBER 31, 2012 TO FILE A 2nd AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT IS OVERRULING THE PORTION OF DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT THAT IS BASED ON 2342 BROADWAY, LLC NOT BEING A PARTY IN THIS ACTION UNTIL THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED. (counsel to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court- WITH APPROVAL FROM opposing counsel- for signature). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
